name: Deal Qualification Standard
author: VP Sales (leadership-defined)
description: Leadership defines what 'qualified' means; the agent grades every deal against it from the field, with evidence. AEs/SEs never fill this out. item_id maps to the field evidence that satisfies it.

items.question: Is there a documented, quantified business case?
items.guidance: A dollarized outcome the buyer is measured on.

items.question: Is the economic buyer identified and engaged?
items.guidance: Someone with budget authority is named.

items.question: Is the decision / mutual action plan mapped?
items.guidance: The steps from here to signature are known.

items.question: Is there a mobilized internal champion?
items.guidance: Someone selling on our behalf internally.

items.question: Is the competitive landscape known and addressed?
items.guidance: We know who we're up against.

items.question: Is the paper / procurement process understood?
items.guidance: Legal, security, MSA timelines are mapped.
